title: Google News Scraper
description: Search Google News by keyword or browse topic, publication, section, story, and Knowledge Graph token pages.

q.title: Search Query
q.description: Keyword or phrase to search in Google News. Leave empty when using a token parameter.

gl.title: Country
gl.description: Two-letter Google News country code, such as us, gb, de, or fr.

hl.title: Language
hl.description: Two-letter Google News interface language, such as en, de, es, or fr.

page.title: Page
page.description: Page number for pagination. Do not use together with Start Offset.

start.title: Start Offset
start.description: Zero-based result offset for pagination. Do not use together with Page.

so.title: Sort Order
so.description: Sort order: 0 for relevance, 1 for date.

topic_token.title: Topic Token
topic_token.description: Google News topic token. Cannot be used with Search Query.

kgmid.title: Knowledge Graph ID
kgmid.description: Google Knowledge Graph entity ID starting with /m/ or /g/. Must be used alone.

publication_token.title: Publication Token
publication_token.description: Google News publication token. Cannot be used with Search Query.

section_token.title: Section Token
section_token.description: Google News section token. Cannot be used with Search Query.

story_token.title: Story Token
story_token.description: Google News story cluster token. Cannot be used with Search Query.
